sites.name: voynich-decoder
sites.description: A Python toolkit for deciphering the Voynich Manuscript — page extraction, computer-vision alphabet building, and EVA-to-English character mapping.

sites.name: au-super
sites.description: Compare every Australian MySuper default super product — all 52 products (37 trustees, $1.21tn member assets, as at 30 June 2025) from APRA's Comprehensive Product Performance Package. 3/5/7/10-year net investment returns, total fees at five balance sizes, the annual performance-test result and margin over benchmark, growth allocation and member numbers. Seven views: sortable Explorer, Rankings with metric toggle, a Fees-vs-Returns scatter with the low-fee/high-return sweet spot shaded, a fee heatmap across balance tiers, a trustee treemap, a returns/fees distribution histogram, and auto-detected Insights, plus a hash-linkable per-product drill-down with the lifecycle glide-path.
data_sources: APRA MySuper Comprehensive Product Performance Package (apra.gov.au)

sites.name: au-visas
sites.description: Interactive explorer for Australia's temporary visa population — the Dept of Home Affairs BP0019 stock dataset (2.88M holders, 59 monthly/quarterly snapshots Dec 2011–May 2026, 218 nationalities, 11 visa categories, 66 subclasses) extracted from the workbook's embedded pivot cache. Seven views: auto-insights, Leaflet world choropleth by citizenship, nationalities leaderboard with 14-year sparklines, nested category→subclass treemap, stacked-area trends, nationality×visa matrix heatmap, and a nationality→visa Sankey, plus a hash-linkable per-nationality drill-down.
data_sources: Temporary visa holders in Australia (BP0019), Dept of Home Affairs via data.gov.au

sites.name: au-relations
sites.description: How Australia formally relates to every other government — the full DFAT Australian Treaties Database (4,512 treaty records since 1901), the complete overseas diplomatic network including accreditation coverage, all 19 FTAs and curated organisation memberships, joined per country. Seven views: countries leaderboard with sparklines, 3-mode Leaflet world map, searchable treaty database, 125-year timeline, force-directed embassy accreditation network, subject × country matrix, and auto-insights, plus a hash-linkable per-country drill-down.
data_sources: DFAT Australian Treaties Database (docs.dfat.gov.au JSON API)
DFAT embassies and consulates overseas list (dfat.gov.au)

sites.name: au-jobs
sites.description: Interactive explorer for the Small Area Labour Markets dataset — smoothed unemployment rate, unemployed persons and labour force for all ~544 Australian local government areas across 62 quarters (Dec 2010–Mar 2026). Seven views: Leaflet choropleth, leaderboard, sortable table with sparklines, 15-year state trend lines, state comparison + quarter heatmap, distribution histogram, and auto-detected insights, plus a hash-linkable per-LGA drill-down.
data_sources: Small Area Labour Markets (Smoothed LGA), Jobs and Skills Australia / DEWR
ABS ASGS 2024 Local Government Area boundaries

sites.name: nsw-pokies
sites.description: Poker machine (pokies) losses for every NSW council area — unifies Liquor & Gaming NSW clubs + hotels gaming-machine data (all 128 LGAs, ~$9bn/yr in player losses) with a leaderboard, Leaflet choropleth, six-year statewide trend, treemap, loss-per-adult distribution, auto-insights and a per-council drill-down.
data_sources: Liquor & Gaming NSW — Gaming Machine Data (Clubs & Hotels, by LGA)

sites.name: au-pay-gap
sites.description: Searchable explorer for the WGEA employer gender pay gaps — 8,600+ Australian employers with median/average base-salary and total-remuneration gaps (2024-25 + 2023-24), women's representation across pay quartiles, and average pay per quartile. Seven views: explorer, industry rankings, glass-pyramid representation, distribution histogram, industry-by-size heatmap, year-on-year movers, and auto-insights, plus a rich employer drill-down.
data_sources: WGEA Employer Gender Pay Gaps spreadsheet (wgea.gov.au)

sites.name: au-contracts
sites.description: Australian federal government procurement explorer — every AusTender contract notice for FY2025-26 (~66,000 contracts worth ~$118B across 128 agencies), pulled from the live Open Contracting (OCDS) API, with supplier/agency leaderboards, a supplier↔agency network graph, agency→category Sankey, agency×category matrix, Leaflet state choropleth, monthly trends, a value-distribution histogram, auto-detected insights and a searchable contract database with click-through drill-down
data_sources: Department of Finance — Australian Government contract notices

sites.name: au-pokies
sites.description: Australian poker machine (pokies) losses by Local Government Area — unifies fragmented state regulator data into one interface with a per-adult leaderboard, Leaflet map, state cross-reference matrix, squarified treemap, per-capita dot plot, and auto-detected insights; highlights that WA bans suburban pokies entirely
data_sources: Liquor & Gaming NSW (gaming machine data by LGA)
Victorian Gambling and Casino Control Commission (VGCCC)
QLD Office of Liquor and Gaming Regulation

sites.name: au-gov
sites.description: Interactive map of the Australian Government — every department, agency, statutory body, and public entity from the AGOR (1,381 bodies across 17 portfolios) with Cabinet view, treemap, portfolio × body-type matrix heatmap, force-directed relationship graph, Leaflet map, timeline of creation, searchable table, and auto-computed insights
data_sources: Australian Government Organisations Register (AGOR) via data.gov.au

sites.name: au-flights
sites.description: On-time performance for every competitive Australian domestic route and airline — 22 years (118,000 rows) of BITRE punctuality, delay and cancellation data with an airline leaderboard, route drill-downs, Leaflet map, force-directed network graph, airline × airport matrix, seasonality heatmap and auto-detected insights
data_sources: BITRE Domestic Airline On Time Performance (data.gov.au)

sites.name: pullshark-board
sites.description: Discover open-source products trending on GitHub, re-ranked live in the browser by an HN-style decay.

sites.name: au-childcare
sites.description: Search and compare every Australian childcare and early-learning service — 18,206 services, 7,206 providers, with overall NQS rating, all seven Quality Area sub-scores, previous-cycle ratings, provider chain rollups, leaderboards, map, matrix heatmap, Sankey flow, and auto-detected insights
data_sources: ACECQA National Register of Approved Services (acecqa.gov.au)
ACECQA National Register of Approved Providers (acecqa.gov.au)
ABS Estimated Resident Population by State

sites.name: au-charities
sites.description: Look up any of Australia's 65,000+ registered charities — sector, finances, where money comes from and goes, plus auto-detected anomalies, leaderboards, Sankey flow, sector × beneficiary matrix and per-capita state map

sites.name: au-pollution
sites.description: Every industrial polluter in Australia — 8,140 facilities, 93 substances, 25 years of National Pollutant Inventory data — searchable, mappable, with auto-detected anomalies, Sankey flow, treemap, heatmap and per-capita state comparison

sites.name: au-ndis-watch
sites.description: Every NDIS Commission compliance action — banning orders, registration revocations, civil penalties, and infringements against Australian disability providers and workers — searchable by name, mappable by state, with auto-generated insights and a plain-language glossary

sites.name: au-agedcare
sites.description: Search and compare every Australian residential aged care home — Star Ratings, staffing, resident surveys, and quality measures from the May 2026 Department of Health quarterly extract
data_sources: Department of Health Star Ratings quarterly data extract (health.gov.au)

sites.name: leader-skills
sites.description: Explore well-documented leaders, then build your own leadership operating system.

sites.name: worldcupinvitations
sites.description: Disguise every 2026 World Cup knockout match as a believable work meeting — pick your profession, browse the full bracket, and download one calendar file so you can watch in peace.

sites.name: dsnwatch
sites.description: Live, consumer-friendly dashboard of NASA's Deep Space Network — three ground complexes, 14 dishes, spacecraft currently tracked, signal flow, MSPA matrix, educational glossary, and session-long history

sites.name: au-crime
sites.description: Standardised Australian crime data explorer — unifies ABS, BOCSAR, QLD Police, SA Police, and other state data sources into one interactive dashboard with 8 views including map, matrix heatmap, leaderboards, and auto-anomaly detection across all 8 states/territories

sites.name: au-planning
sites.description: Unified planning and development application explorer across Australian councils — search, filter, and visualise DAs by type, status, suburb, and processing time with 7 interactive views
data_sources: City of Casey (VIC) Open Data API

sites.name: au-crashes
sites.description: Interactive explorer for 58,000+ Australian road fatality records (1989–2026) from the BITRE ARDD, with 8 visualization views including trends, maps, demographics, and temporal heatmaps

sites.name: au-donations
sites.description: Searchable Australian political donations explorer unifying the AEC Transparency Register and all state/territory disclosure registers into one interface with filters, aggregates, and jurisdiction comparison

sites.name: au-hospitals
sites.description: Searchable Australian hospital performance explorer — ED 4-hour departure rates, triage response times, and elective surgery waits for 1,400+ hospitals via AIHW MyHospitals API

sites.name: nemwatch
sites.description: Live Australian electricity spot prices and grid demand for all NEM regions, updated every 5 minutes from AEMO data

sites.name: au-dams
sites.description: Live storage levels for 26 major Australian dams and reservoirs via BOM WISKI API
data_sources: Bureau of Meteorology Water Data Online (KISTERS WISKI API)

sites.name: threatglobe
sites.description: Real-time global cyber threat observatory with interactive 3D globe

sites.name: artemis-tracker
sites.description: Real-time Artemis mission tracker with 3D trajectory visualization

sites.name: tariff-check
sites.description: Tariff impact checker

sites.name: Fire-Watch-Australia
sites.description: Australian bushfire watch and monitoring

sites.name: CrimeAware
sites.description: iOS crime statistics map for Australia (NSW & Victoria)

sites.name: leaf-log
sites.description: Plant care and leaf tracking log

sites.name: MedTriage
sites.description: Medical triage decision support tool

sites.name: controlroom-org
sites.description: Control room organization tool

sites.name: pace-calc
sites.description: Running pace calculator

sites.description: Stash manager

sites.description: Due date and return tracker
